task_completion.description: Configure the spider to limit the crawl to 200 URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider's configuration window (Config > Spider > Limits) is visible with the 'Limit Crawl Total' set to 200.

task_completion.description: Start crawling the target e-commerce sandbox site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL 'https://books.toscrape.com/' is entered in the main URL bar of Screaming Frog and the 'Start' button has been clicked, showing active crawling progress.

task_completion.description: Complete the crawl up to the specified limit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The crawl progress bar reaches 100% or stops, and the total number of crawled URLs shown in the interface is exactly or approximately 200.
The 'Visualisations' menu is accessed and 'Force-Directed Crawl Diagram' is selected, or the actual Force-Directed Crawl Diagram window is open and rendering the node graph.

task_completion.description: Export the visualization as an HTML file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box is visible showing the file being saved as 'site_graph.html' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a file manager/terminal window confirms the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Screaming Frog application window being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or python scripts being used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent generated the visualization using the built-in tool feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Force-Directed Crawl Diagram is seen generating within the Screaming Frog application environment, not downloaded from the internet or created via a separate script.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The system save dialog is invoked from within Screaming Frog, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch', 'echo', or 'curl' to create a dummy 'site_graph.html' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Expected Output Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/site_graph.html. Crawl Limit: 200 URLs (must be configured in Screaming Frog's Spider Limits). The exported file must be an HTML file strictly larger than 1024 bytes and contain the domain name 'books.toscrape.com'.
